session_summary: Lane 3: Lifecycle Engine Package — Completed. All 6 deliverables existed from prior sessions. Identified and fixed Effect 4 API incompatibilities: Schema.Literal only accepts single values (use Schema.Literals([...]) for unions) and Schema.Array produces readonly types (wrap in Schema.mutable()). These fixes resolved all lifecycle-related typecheck errors (builtins.ts, config/agent.ts, agent/agent.ts, config/config.ts). JSON Schema validates correctly.
next_steps: Merge the lifecycle package into main. The package is self-contained and ready for consumers. Next lane could wire LifecycleEngine into the agent loop or create lifecycle definitions for additional agent types.
